Patch Set 1:

> Etienne, is there a "Fixes" for this patch (i.e. was the breakage introduced in a recent landing)?  Also, a test case to reproduce this issue would be good, because we clearly don't have any tests that cover this case today.

Hi Andreas, I built a test for this (to check if the recovery update the pfid) and it does not fix it.
update_is_committed() use lsf_seq_lookup to determine the mdt index of an object. So OST object will not work.

I found this comment too:

static int mdd_object_pfid_replace(const struct lu_env *env,                  
                                   struct mdd_object *o)                      
{                                                                             
.....                                   
                                                                              
        handle->th_complex = 1;                                               
                                                                              
        /* it doesn't need to track the PFID update via llog, because LFSCK   
         * will repair it even it goes wrong                                  
         */                                                                   
        rc = mdd_declare_xattr_set(env, mdd, o, NULL, XATTR_NAME_FID,         

So, I guess that pfid was never plain to be part of the recovery.

I have a hard time to understand how distributed transaction work. I need to dig more around this.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

Looks good to me.

parents.subject: LU-17402 kernel: update dotdot patch path for RHEL 8.10

commit.subject: LU-18021 update: fix update_is_commited() FID lookup
commit.message:
LU-18021 update: fix update_is_commited() FID lookup

Update log can have records with OST object, so update_is_commited()
should lookup for OST object FID. Otherwise this will fail the replay:

LustreError: 14032:0:(fld_handler.c:264:fld_server_lookup())
srv-lustre-MDT0000: Cannot find sequence 0x2c0000404: rc = -2

Signed-off-by: Etienne AUJAMES <eaujames@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Ibbd95178218586e8deef9183e13e5dca830a53d1
